requirements.source_locator: Signed contract: project scope and deliverable inventory
requirements.criterion: Register and trace the full controlled corpus without redistributing restricted binaries.
requirements.verification_method: Registry count/hash and requirement trace audit

requirements.criterion: Provide POE copolymerization reaction network, rate equations and parameter basis.
requirements.verification_method: Equation-to-code review, unit analysis and independent fixtures
requirements.deviation: Historical MATLAB implementation contains unresolved equation/index/unit questions; isolated from the reference kernel.

requirements.criterion: Provide ethylene/propylene copolymerization kinetics evidence and model assets.
Develop reactor selection/design basis including CSTR/PFR, mixing and heat removal.
requirements.verification_method: Reactor model dossier, balances and scale-specific acceptance

requirements.criterion: Provide a pilot/1 kt/y steady-state flowsheet and report.
requirements.verification_method: Content-level package audit and independent mass/energy closure
requirements.deviation: Historical pilot steady model reportedly did not fully close the recycle loop.

requirements.criterion: Provide a pilot/1 kt/y dynamic case, disturbance tests and operating report.
requirements.verification_method: Dynamic asset presence, initialization, ±10% disturbance and recovery criteria

requirements.criterion: Provide a 200 kt/y steady-state flowsheet and process data package.
requirements.verification_method: Content-level package audit and independent balances

requirements.criterion: Provide traceable evidence for any 200 kt/y full-process dynamic-model claim.
requirements.verification_method: Require matching dynamic report and dynamic binary identity
requirements.deviation: No matching 200 kt/y dynamic report or .dynf asset was found in the audited corpus.

requirements.criterion: Qualify VLE, density, enthalpy, heat capacity, viscosity and transport methods over the operating envelope.
requirements.verification_method: Method passport, benchmark errors, range and extrapolation audit

requirements.criterion: Close component, total mass, energy, solvent, impurity, VOC and water balances.
requirements.verification_method: Independent balance kernel with declared tolerance

requirements.criterion: Define and justify flash, preconcentration, devolatilization/steam stripping and finishing.
Close recycle connections, impurity memory and purge basis.
requirements.verification_method: Topology, recycle closure and impurity accumulation tests
requirements.deviation: High-boiler and comonomer overhead return streams were not demonstrably connected back to polymerization.

requirements.criterion: Provide process topology and narrative consistent with streams and equipment.
Provide equipment, utilities, instrumentation, control and piping interfaces.
requirements.verification_method: Structured records and named engineering review

requirements.criterion: Preserve executable-program/model identities and documented restoration/use instructions.
requirements.verification_method: Asset passport, software version, hash and clean restoration test
requirements.deviation: Commercial software versions and clean restoration evidence are incomplete.

requirements.criterion: Provide Chinese instructions for controlled simulator/model assets.
Where the contract applies an 8% relative-error criterion, trace metric, reference data, scope and exceptions.
requirements.verification_method: Recompute named metrics from independent fixtures; no aggregate claim without locators

requirements.criterion: Trace every acceptance conclusion to evidence, deviation disposition and named approver.
